labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 621310 ($6,309,757,503) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 621310 ($16,455,783,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

occupations.title: First-Line Supervisors of Office and Administrative Support Workers
Secretaries and Administrative Assistants, Except Legal, Medical, and Executive

n_band.derivation: margin 0.1580 (margins.json[62]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Hospitals/Healthcare Facilities EBITDA/Sales 15.80% (closest named bucket for provider economics; public support-services bucket at 3.87% reflects a different business model)); revenue/employee $110,018 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 621310); class <5: 28,655 firms, avg revenue/firm $247,431 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $39,094 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 8,029 firms, avg revenue/firm $621,255 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $98,158 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 2,154 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,236,715 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $195,401 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 424 firms, avg revenue/firm $3,091,243 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $488,416 -> out of $1-10M band; class 100-499: 25 firms, avg revenue/firm $11,914,440 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,882,482 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 11 firms, avg revenue/firm $9,561,455 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,510,710 -> IN $1-10M band; n_band = 36
